title: Three Mass. human service groups cut 200 jobs amid funding reductions
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News The organizations warn that the reductions will strain mental health, addiction, rehabilitation, and homelessness programs statewide.

Three Massachusetts human service organizations will cut a combined 200 jobs due to funding losses to care management providers.

title: Officials to drivers during World Cup: Stay away
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Local News MassDOT is warning drivers to avoid the roads during match days and to utilize public transportation as much as possible.
Traffic slowly crawls across the Foxborough town line headed towards Gillette Stadium before a pre-season Patriots game.

(Aram Boghosian for The Boston Globe) World Cup On Monday, the Massachusetts Department of Transportation launched a statewide campaign called “Kick the Drive” to reduce traffic and keep people moving during the seven FIFA World Cup matches taking place this summer.

title: Photos: Beyoncé, Bad Bunny, and Janelle Monáe take artistic liberties with Met Gala dress code
author: The Associated Press
bullets: Celebs Beyoncé.

ANGELA WEISS / AFP via Getty Images NEW YORK (AP) — Met Gala guests from Beyoncé and Naomi Osaka to Emma Chamberlain did not play it safe this year for the Met Gala, delivering custom works of art in honor of the dress code “Fashion is art.
”Beyoncé left the cowboy hat at home and dazzled in a custom Olivier Rousteing sculptural skeleton dress with a cream and dust blue feathered train fitted with a diamond crown for “Queen Bey.
